mapper.sql: id, code, name, status, robot_type_no, robot_group_no, low_battery_threshold, min_charge_minutes, charge_method, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO robot_charge_strategy (code, name, status, robot_type_no, robot_group_no, low_battery_threshold, min_charge_minutes, charge_method, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{status}, #{robotTypeNo}, #{robotGroupNo}, #{lowBatteryThreshold}, #{minChargeMinutes}, #{chargeMethod}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
